src: A young skater in a dark t-shirt and denim shorts performs tricks on a wooden skateboard with four small wheels. He wears a cap and sneakers, focused in an urban area with a clean tiled surface.
edit: A young snowboarder in a dark t-shirt and denim shorts performs tricks on a sleek snowboard. He wears a cap and adapted footwear on a clean tiled urban surface.

per_image_non_shared_src.01: The person is crouched slightly to the left of the skatepark, with a tiled square, green bench on the right, and black tiled wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.07: The person is mid-jump, arms spread wide. A green bench is on the right and a black-tiled wall is in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.10: A person balances on a board above a green bench, arms slightly bent. The setting has a tiled surface with a black wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.19: A person leans forward, moving toward the green bench on the right, in a tiled square with a black wall at the back.
per_image_non_shared_src.23: The person stands upright with a slight forward lean in a tiled area, a green bench on the right, and a dark-tiled wall background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.01: A person crouched to the left of the skatepark, in a winter jacket with frosted edges. Background: a snow-covered tiled square, a frosty green bench on the right, and a black tiled wall with icicles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.07: A person is mid-jump, arms spread, in a puffy winter coat. A green bench with snow is on the right, and a black-tiled wall with frost is in the background, with icy blue hues.
per_image_non_shared_edit.10: The person balances on a board above a snow-covered green bench, arms bent, in a puffy winter coat. Behind is a black wall with snowflakes and icicles hang from edges, under a winter sun.
per_image_non_shared_edit.19: A person leaning forward, moving toward a snow-dusted green bench on the right. The scene features a tiled square with white frost, under a pale winter sun. A black wall at the back has icicles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.23: A person stands upright with a slight forward lean in thick winter clothing. The scene has a tiled area with light snow, a green bench on the right, a dark-tiled wall with icicles, and slender shadows in the low winter sun.
